claim.observation: The VANKO next-step safe summary records parser coverage across EVTX, Chrome History, LNK, JumpList, Amcache, AppCompat, and SRUM-derived outputs.
claim.interpretation: The next-step probe produced usable parsed surfaces for further case-building. This establishes artifact coverage and triage leads only; it does not establish execution, transfer, malware, user identity, or intent.
